authors.author: Michael Ledner
Michael Ledner
Du bist mein Zufluchtsort (ich berge mich in deiner Hand)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are my hiding place You always fill my heart With songs of deliverance Whenever I am afraid I will trust in You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will trust in You Let the weak say I am strong In the strength of the Lord I will trust in You.
